# **Reference Documentation \- Player**

## Stars Align Video Game

# **Introduction**

Here are some common questions that I hope I can answer for any potential new players before or during your playthrough of this game.

# **FAQ**

## *How do I install the game?*

- Use steam to download the game.  
- The game can run on the following systems:  
  - Windows 10 or later  
  - macOS 10.10 or later  
  - Most modern Linux distributions (e.g., Ubuntu 20.04)  
  - A web version will be made that can then be played online on any modern browser supporting WebAssembly

## *Is the game single player?*

- Yes, this is a single player choice based game.

## *How do I play?*

- This is a point and click puzzle game so it is recommended to have a mouse.  
- There are portions of the game where the player will need to use A/D/W keys to move around.  
- Since the game uses a groundhog day system, the player should make changes in the constellations/grid screen to make changes to the main character’s personality to experience different outcomes and puzzles.

## *What is the goal?*

- Your goal as the player is to help the main character to tidy up the room, and eventually leave said room \- uncovering the reason she is so insistent not to.  
- Your short term goals consist of solving puzzles.

## *What do these things mean?*

- **Constellations screen**; a screen where you can change the characteristics/personality of the character you are interacting with in the room.

![][image1]

- **Inventory**; in the storybook sequence the player can collect items by clicking on them and saving them to an inventory.  
- **Achievements**; a screen where you can see what collected achievements you have unlocked and what/how many you still have left to discover.  
- **Preferences**; a screen where you can adjust the following;  
  - volume of sound, music and voices  
  - text speed, and auto-forward time  
  - you can make the game look fullscreen, or as a window  
  - adjust what type of text you want to skip (unseen text, after choices, transitions)

![][image2]

## *Why am I not progressing?*

- As stated before this is a game based on repeating the same day over and over again. Try to change the character’s personality to access new puzzles. Try different combinations of personality traits, not just putting them in one by one.

## *What if I am really stuck?*

- If you are stuck or lost check out our community page where people share how they solved puzzles, ask questions to get unstuck.  
- Also join the project’s discord to get further help.

## *Will there be a sequel?*

- No.

## *Where can I find my gameplay statistics?*

- The game does not keep track of your playing statistics. However, on Steam and Itch.io they have built in trackers for how much time you spend playing a game.

## *How long does this game take?*

- Once the game is completed it should have around 1-2 hours of gameplay time.

## *Does this game support cloud saves?*

- There is a local save system, but unless you play on Steam there will be no cloud save support.
